ELEVATION_MAP.TITLE: Elevation map
ELEVATION_MAP.NO_MAP: No elevation map has been uploaded for this project yet. Upload the elevation file in the 'Files' page and choose document type 'Elevation map (install)'.
ELEVATION_MAP.RETURN_HINT: Tap a station to return this unit there for rework

PROFILE.TITLE: My profile
PROFILE.SUBTITLE: Personal settings, language and appearance for a smoother shop-floor workflow.
PROFILE.EDIT_NAME_HINT: Update the display name shown across the system and tablet menu.
PROFILE.APPEARANCE_HINT: Choose light or dark mode for your working environment.
PROFILE.LANGUAGE_HINT: Choose interface language and layout direction.

ADMIN_PAGE.TITLE: Control panel
ADMIN_PAGE.SHIPPING_SUB: Units that cleared packing for site delivery
ADMIN_PAGE.DAILY_PROGRESS_HINT: Reported units per day — last 7 days (UTC)
ADMIN_PAGE.STATION_LOAD_HINT: Cumulative processed units by station within the current filter
ADMIN_PAGE.OPEN_PDF_HINT: Open PDF in a new tab
ADMIN_PAGE.LIVE_PROJECTS_SUB: Active projects that can open directly into the station live map.

PLANNING.TITLE: Planning upload (תפ״י)
PLANNING.SUBTITLE: Create a project, upload Excel/CSV, verify the preview, then approve to unlock Saws only.
PLANNING.DROP_LABEL: Drag Excel or CSV here, or choose a file
PLANNING.UPLOAD_AGAIN_HINT: Replace or upload another planning file:
PLANNING.PICK_PROJECT: Select a project in the filter above to attach a תפ״י file.
PLANNING.STATUS_IN_PRODUCTION: Planning approved — Saws station is unlocked; downstream follows the normal chain.
PLANNING.DETAIL_BY_SHEET_HINT: Each section matches one worksheet from the file. Expand to see every unit/window, a sample of BOM lines, and embedded pictures from the workbook.
PLANNING.IMAGES_FROM_FILE_HINT: Anchor cell as in Excel: row 1 is the first spreadsheet row.
PLANNING.IMAGES_ORPHAN_HINT: Sketches that were not tied to a specific planning row (often headers or areas outside the BOM block).
PLANNING.IMAGES_EXTRA_ROW: Additional pictures (not linked to a component)

PLANNING_NEW.TITLE: New project
PLANNING_NEW.LEAD: Create a project, upload Excel/CSV, review the preview, then approve to send work to the Saws station.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_LEAD: A guided flow in three steps: name, file intake, then assignment and approval for Saws.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_STEP1_DESC: The name appears on the order, dashboard, and worker terminal — keep it clear and unique.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_STEP2_DESC: Drag an Excel or CSV file, or browse from disk. After parsing you will see a summary and per-sheet detail.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_STEP3_DESC: Pick a unit from the grid, assign a station manager and workers per station, then launch to production — the cycle appears on the worker terminal only after launch.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_MANAGER_NONE_HINT: If a station manager exists in the system, they are shown by default.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_WORKERS_NONE_HINT: The order appears in the station list for any authorised worker.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_WORKER_MULTI_HINT: Select multiple workers — tap again to remove someone from the selection.
PLANNING_NEW.ANGLE_SOURCING_NONE_CARD_HINT: No laser station and no angle production
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_MANAGER_EMPTY: No site / project manager users available
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_CREATE_FAILED: Could not create the project. Try again.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_RESUME_HINT: Tap a draft to continue from where you left off (with or without an uploaded file).
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_NO_DRAFTS: There are no planning drafts right now.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_DRAFTS_PAGE_HINT: All drafts live on a dedicated page — cards, rows, and progress.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_FLOW_PARSE: After approval, saws work lines are created only for MPS-X / MPS-Y / MPB-X / MPB-Y X2 profiles from the Excel file (including per-column images when present).
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_CYCLES_HINT: Each window with uploaded production instructions opens a work cycle. Pick a cycle, assign a manager and workers per station, and set a daily target.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_CYCLES_EMPTY: No production instructions uploaded yet. Go back and upload instructions for the units.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_CYCLES_FAILED: Could not load the work cycles.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_CYCLE_SAVE_FAILED: Saving the assignment failed. Please try again.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_UNIT_GRID_HINT: Click a unit to assign station managers and workers. Only units with production instructions appear here.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_UNIT_SELECT_STATION: Select a station to assign a manager and workers
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_NO_STATION_MANAGER: No manager defined for this station.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_ASSIGNEES_FAILED: Could not load the assignee list. You can still approve without an assignee.
PLANNING_NEW.WIZARD_ASSIGNEE_NONE_HINT: The order appears in the station list — any authorised worker can select it on the terminal.
PLANNING_NEW.LOAD_LIST_FAILED: Could not load the project list.
PLANNING_NEW.APPROVED_SAVED_HINT: The project was saved and moved to production (it no longer appears in this draft list). Pick another draft or create a new project.

PLANNING_PDF.SLOT_ELEVATION_DESC: Each unit represents a physical item, with its window-type code.
PLANNING_PDF.SLOT_QUANTITIES_DESC: Facade × window-type matrix, totals and stages.
PLANNING_PDF.SLOT_ANGLE_DESC: Angles (ANG-1A / ANG-1B) + quantities. You can upload several files.
PLANNING_PDF.EMPTY: Upload the files to preview the extracted data.
PLANNING_PDF.ANG_MISSING_PDF: Missing instruction file for this ANG
PLANNING_PDF.ANG_REQUIRED_WARN: Angles were detected in the drawing but still have no ANG file. You can continue now and upload these files later:
PLANNING_PDF.STEEL_DESC: Upload the appendix files for the steelwork station. You can add several files; a target quantity is optional per file.
PLANNING_PDF.STAGES_SUB: Each stage in its color, with the facades assigned to it grouped by direction.
PLANNING_PDF.LOCKED_UNTIL_QTY: Upload the quantities + stages file first
PLANNING_PDF.FACADE_HAS_MAP: An elevation map was uploaded for this facade
PLANNING_PDF.FACADE_NO_MAP: No elevation map uploaded for this facade yet
PLANNING_PDF.ELEV_CHECKLIST_SUB: Each facade group (e.g. N5) has one file covering all its sub-facades (N5-w, N5-e).
PLANNING_PDF.ELEV_MISSING_WARN: {{count}} groups are still missing an elevation map. You can continue, but completing all of them is recommended.
PLANNING_PDF.QTY_BREAKDOWN_SUB: Quantity, facades, angles and units per window type.
PLANNING_PDF.PARTS_HINT: The system extracted the tables automatically. Review and fix any error — what you confirm here is what the assembly worker will see.
PLANNING_PDF.PARTS_EMPTY: No parts tables detected. You can add them manually via "Review & edit".
PLANNING_PDF.WINDOW_PICKER_SUB: Choose a unit and upload the matching instruction file.
PLANNING_PDF.WINDOW_PICKER_EMPTY: No window types detected yet — upload the quantities + stages file first.

ADMIN_DELIVERY_NOTES.TITLE: Delivery notes
ADMIN_DELIVERY_NOTES.SUB: Notes issued at pack station and sent to site assembly.
ADMIN_DELIVERY_NOTES.CANCEL_CONFIRM: Cancel this delivery note? Items will become available to ship again.

ADMIN_PLANNING_DRAFTS.TITLE: Planning drafts
ADMIN_PLANNING_DRAFTS.SUB: Projects you left mid-flow — before final approval and handoff to production.
ADMIN_PLANNING_DRAFTS.SUB_HINT: After «Approve & send to Saws station» and the success popup, the project is removed from this list (it appears under Projects in production).
ADMIN_PLANNING_DRAFTS.DELETE_CONFIRM: Delete draft «{{name}}»? This cannot be undone.

ADMIN_PROJECTS.TITLE: Projects
ADMIN_PROJECTS.SUB: Click a card for full reporting and scrap detail — or use the quick link to the station grid
ADMIN_PROJECTS.SCRAP_EMPTY: No scrap reported for this project
ADMIN_PROJECTS.LIVE_POLL_HINT: Data refreshes automatically every few seconds
ADMIN_PROJECTS.LIVE_ERR: Could not load station data. Make sure the API is running.
ADMIN_PROJECTS.LIVE_DENIED: Live view is only available for in-progress projects with reporting at station 1.
ADMIN_PROJECTS.COMPLETE_PROJECT_HELP: Available when all seven stations (including on-site assembly) are at 100%.

ADMIN_SCRAP_PAGE.TITLE: Cumulative scrap
ADMIN_SCRAP_PAGE.SUB: Factory savings view — cumulative scrap, daily trend, and order simulation link
ADMIN_SCRAP_PAGE.DETAIL_SUB: Each station scrap report — length × quantity
ADMIN_SCRAP_PAGE.SIM_CTA_TEXT: Compare order needs against accumulated scrap to see reusable material.
ADMIN_SCRAP_PAGE.INSIGHT_BETTER: Today is {{delta}} mm lower than yesterday ({{pct}}%). Positive direction for plant savings.
ADMIN_SCRAP_PAGE.INSIGHT_WORSE: Today is {{delta}} mm higher than yesterday ({{pct}}%). Review stations with an increase.
ADMIN_SCRAP_PAGE.INSIGHT_FLAT: Daily scrap is similar to yesterday — stable reporting pace.
ADMIN_SCRAP_PAGE.PROJECTS_SUB: Click a card to filter quickly

ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.TITLE: Users
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.SUB: Team management, roles, and performance — click a user for their mini dashboard.
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.LIST_EMPTY: No users yet — create the first one.
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.NAME: Name
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.CREATE_SUB: Set login details, role, and permissions — the user appears in the list immediately.
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.PASSWORD_MIN: Password must be at least 6 characters.
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.FORM_ERROR: Could not create user (email may already exist).
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.PERF_SUB: Activity from station reports — estimated hours from time spans between reports on the same day.
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.NO_ACTIVITY: No reports linked to this user yet.
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.FILTER_EMPTY: No users match your filters — try adjusting the criteria.
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.EDIT_SUB: Update details, role, or password — leave password blank to keep it.
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.DAILY_TARGET_SUB: Target vs actual — active time estimated from station reports.
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.TARGET_ERROR: Could not load daily target data.
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.TARGET_NO_GOAL_DAY: No target set for this day — add one manually.
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.TARGET_HISTORY_EMPTY: No targets or activity to show yet.
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.TARGET_FORM_REQUIRED: Please fill date, description, and target time.
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.TARGET_HOURS_INVALID: Target time must be between 0.25 and 24 hours.
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.TARGET_ALERTS_BANNER: {{count}} workers are behind today's target — click for details
ADMIN_USERS_PAGE.TARGET_ALERT_MISSED: Daily target not met — performance is below the required level.

ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.TITLE: Order simulation vs scrap
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SUB: Define need by profile (MPS/MPB or custom drawn), length and qty — compare to scrap inventory from a source project.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.INVENTORY_SUB: Click to start a simulation — scrap comes from the selected source project
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SAVINGS_FULL: Project scrap covers the full need in this scenario — reuse scrap instead of ordering new material.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SAVINGS_PARTIAL: {{covered}} mm ({{pct}}%) of need can be covered from scrap. Still {{gap}} mm short for a new order.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SAVINGS_EMPTY: Enter quantities in the simulation to calculate need.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SCRAP_DRIFT: Live scrap differs by {{mm}} mm since save
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.LINES_SUB_PROFILE: Exact match: same profile, same length (mm) and qty — leftover scrap from earlier projects
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.LIST_EMPTY: No simulations yet — create one with the button above.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.DETAIL_EMPTY: Pick a simulation from the list or create a new one.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.ERR_NEED_LINE: Add at least one need line with qty and length.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.ERR_SEARCH_NEED: Enter qty and length before searching.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SEARCH_FOUND_FULL: Source project scrap covers all need lines — you can reuse existing scrap.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SEARCH_NONE: No matching scrap (profile + length) in the source project.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SEARCH_PARTIAL: Partial scrap match — some lines are not fully covered.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SEARCH_NO_INPUT: No valid need lines to search.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SEARCH_LINE_OK: In scrap: {{qty}} pieces at the same length and profile.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SEARCH_LINE_MISSING: No matching scrap for this line.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SEARCH_LINE_SHORT: Scrap has {{have}} of {{need}} — still short {{gap}} pieces.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.ERR_SEARCH_REFRESH: Could not refresh scrap inventory — try again.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SEARCH_SIMILAR: In scrap: {{code}} · {{qty}} × {{len}} mm (same length, different profile).
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SEARCH_WRONG_LENGTH: {{code}} at {{len}} mm ({{qty}} pcs) in stock — you searched {{searchedLen}} mm.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SEARCH_STOCK_EMPTY: No scrap reported for this project.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.SCRAP_FROZEN_HINT: Scrap is frozen from save time (for consistent comparisons). Use the Scrap page for live totals.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.REORDER_NEEDED: Gap vs saved scrap — consider ordering more material.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.REORDER_OK: Against saved scrap for this simulation — no gap for the computed need.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.MODAL_SUB: Pick a scrap source project and define need lines by profile and length.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.MODAL_PROJECT_HINT: Scrap is taken from this project's reports at save time.
ADMIN_SIM_PAGE.ERR_PROJECT: No project available — refresh the page.

ADMIN_FILES_PAGE.TITLE: Files by project
ADMIN_FILES_PAGE.SUB: Work orders and purchase orders — by project
ADMIN_FILES_PAGE.FILTER_EMPTY: No files match the current filters.
ADMIN_FILES_PAGE.LIST_EMPTY: No files uploaded yet — start with a PDF upload.
ADMIN_FILES_PAGE.SEND_SUB: Pick recipients from the team list or add an email address.
ADMIN_FILES_PAGE.SEND_OK: Done — check your mail app if a draft opened.
ADMIN_FILES_PAGE.SEND_ERR_LOAD_USERS: Could not load the employee list.
ADMIN_FILES_PAGE.UPLOAD_HINT: Attach a work order or purchase order to an existing project, or create a new planning draft and attach the file in one step.
ADMIN_FILES_PAGE.UPLOAD_ERR_BAD_NAME: Enter a project name (at least 2 characters).
ADMIN_FILES_PAGE.UPLOAD_ERR_NO_PROJECT: Please select a project from the list.

ADMIN_SETTINGS_PAGE.TITLE: System settings
ADMIN_SETTINGS_PAGE.SUB: Appearance, account and system status — in one place
ADMIN_SETTINGS_PAGE.APPEARANCE_SUB: Tune the interface for your workspace
ADMIN_SETTINGS_PAGE.PROFILE_SUB: Display name and photo on this device
ADMIN_SETTINGS_PAGE.CLEAR_LOCAL_HINT: Removes order simulations stored in this browser only.
ADMIN_SETTINGS_PAGE.CLEAR_LOCAL_CONFIRM: Delete saved order simulations from this browser?
ADMIN_SETTINGS_PAGE.SERVER_HINT: Server settings (email, DB) are managed via production environment variables.

WORKER.CYCLES_HINT: Each window with production instructions opens a cycle. Report how many units were cut per cycle.
WORKER.CYCLES_UNIT_NOT_HERE: The selected unit has no remaining work at this station — showing all waiting cycles.
WORKER.CYCLE_REPORT_HINT: Choose how many units were completed now
WORKER.SAW_PROFILE_LINES_HINT: Only MPS-X, MPS-Y, MPB-X, MPB-Y X2 columns from planning — images from the workbook when present.
WORKER.SAW_PROFILE_LINES_EMPTY: No saws lines for this project (or planning not approved yet).
WORKER.SAW_INSTRUCTIONS_HINT: Open the production instructions file for the selected unit
WORKER.SAW_VIEW_INSTRUCTIONS_HINT: Click “View” to open production instructions for {{code}}
WORKER.SAW_TYPE_TILE_ARIA_LOCKED: Locked — waiting for saw station report
WORKER.WT_DOCS_HINT: Per window type: composition, sets, angles and the full instruction file.
WORKER.LASER_HINT: Produce angles (ANG) per the files and quantities.
WORKER.LASER_EXTERNAL: Angle sourcing: external supplier — station is display-only.
WORKER.LASER_EMPTY: No ANG angles in this project.
WORKER.STEEL_HINT: Steelwork connection-detail appendices — open the PDF and report quantity.
WORKER.REWORK_HINT: Units marked defective on the elevation map and returned for rework.
WORKER.ASSEMBLY_WINDOW_GUIDE_HINT: Assembly diagram from the Window Instruction sheet in the planning file.
WORKER.ASM_DOCS_HINT: The unit's instruction sheet — the page 1 table, the full page 2 table, and the full parts mapping.
WORKER.ASM_MAP_EMPTY: Mapping not processed yet. Re-upload the instruction PDF in planning to extract the tables.
WORKER.ASM_REPORT_LOCKED: Check every assembly item before saving & reporting
WORKER.ASSEMBLY_PIPELINE_HINT: Profiles sawn and processed on CNC — ready for assembly.
WORKER.ASSEMBLY_TYPE_MODAL_HINT: Update assembly quantities, upload a photo, and save the report for this type.
WORKER.ASSEMBLY_INSTRUCTIONS_HINT: From the Windows instructions sheet — mark when assembled.
WORKER.ASSEMBLY_WINDOWS_EMPTY: No window units found in planning file.
WORKER.GLUING_HINT: For each TYPE — confirm gluing is complete for all GL codes from planning.
WORKER.GLUING_EMPTY: No GL codes (GL-*) found in planning file.
WORKER.GLUING_LOCKED_WAIT_CNC: Waiting for CNC to finish this TYPE
WORKER.GLUING_MODAL_HINT: Confirm gluing is complete for all GL codes in this type.
WORKER.WORK_LINE_MODAL_TOTAL_PLANNED: Total to process on this screen: {{qty}}
WORKER.SAW_MODAL_TOTAL_TO_SAW: Total to saw on this screen: {{qty}}
WORKER.WORK_LINE_MODAL_TOTAL_LABEL: Total to process on this screen
WORKER.SAW_NEXT_PARTIAL_HINT: You can move to CNC after the first saw report — finish remaining TYPEs at the saw station in parallel.
WORKER.CNC_WAIT_SAW_REPORT: No saw report yet for this project — report at least one TYPE at the saw station first.
WORKER.ACTIVITY_LOG_TITLE: Activity log — all stations on this project
WORKER.ACTIVITY_LOG_EMPTY: No station reports for this project yet.
WORKER.ACT_LOG_S1: Saws: {{qty}} bars, {{mm}} mm cut length per bar
WORKER.PACK_PHOTOS_HINT: Upload one photo per slot documenting what was arranged and packed before moving on
WORKER.PACK_PHOTOS_STEP_1: Photograph the surface or crate after packing
WORKER.PACK_PHOTOS_STEP_2: Tap each slot to upload a clear photo
WORKER.PACK_PHOTOS_STEP_3: Complete all photos to reach 100% and unlock the next station
WORKER.PACK_PHOTOS_NEXT_HINT: Upload all photos, then issue a delivery note
WORKER.PACK_PHOTOS_COMPLETE: All photos uploaded — continue to issue delivery note
WORKER.PACK_AND_DELIVERY_COMPLETE: Pack and delivery note complete — site assembly is unlocked
WORKER.DELIVERY_HINT: After photos are complete — issue a note with all project items
WORKER.DELIVERY_ISSUED_HINT: Delivery note issued and sent to site assembly
WORKER.DELIVERY_MODAL_HINT: Choose shipping type. Items are loaded automatically from planning.
WORKER.DELIVERY_ERR_NO_ITEMS: Select at least one item to ship
WORKER.DELIVERY_MANAGER_ONLY: Only the pack station manager can issue delivery notes
WORKER.DELIVERY_PARTIAL_HINT: {{remaining}} items remaining — you can issue another partial shipment
WORKER.DELIVERY_PARTIAL_COMPLETE: Shipment issued — more partial shipments can follow
WORKER.SITE_NEW_DELIVERY_ALERT: New delivery note received — you can start working
WORKER.SITE_AWAITING_DELIVERY: Waiting for delivery note from pack station. Assembly cannot start until the note is issued.
WORKER.VERIFY_HINT: Tap each stage, review its activity log, and approve — only then it is marked verified
WORKER.FINISH_VERIFY_MODAL_SUB: Review reports before approving this stage
WORKER.FINISH_VERIFY_LOG_EMPTY: No reports for this station on this project
WORKER.SUCCESS_PACK: All done successfully — ready to ship
WORKER.PROGRESS_NO_UPSTREAM: No quantity from the previous step yet — progress applies once items arrive.
WORKER.STATION_MANAGER_HINT: Responsible for operations, quality, and progress at this station.
WORKER.PLANNING_SAWS_TEAM_HINT: Workers selected when the plan was approved — for coordination at the station.
WORKER.SITE_STATION_INTRO: After all factory stations and delivery to the site — report final on-site assembly (beams, glazing, unitized) per the delivery note.
WORKER.SITE_REPORT_CTA_HINT: Open the report window — upload the delivery note and enter quantities.
WORKER.SITE_REPORT_MODAL_HINT: Enter how many units were assembled on site per the delivery note.
WORKER.SITE_UPLOAD_HINT: Upload the delivery note from the site. After upload, target quantities appear (automatic scan — this version uses a stub tied to order size).
WORKER.SITE_SCAN_STUB: Full release: OCR will parse beams / glazing / unitized from the document.
WORKER.STATION_COMPLETE_DESC: This station is done. You can move on to {{next}}.

STATIONS_LOADER.TITLE: Loading the station grid…
STATIONS_LOADER.SUB: Pulling data from all seven work stations
STATIONS_LOADER.LIVE_SUB: Loading progress from every station — just a moment

LOGIN.TITLE: Sign in to SkyFlow
LOGIN.SUB: Use your work email and password — stations, admin, or planning, depending on your role.
LOGIN.SITE_MANAGER_POPUP_HINT: This station is for site managers only. Sign in with a SITE_MANAGER account to report.
LOGIN.SITE_MANAGER_REQUIRED: A site manager (SITE_MANAGER) account is required.
LOGIN.NOT_ADMIN: This account is not an admin. Only admins can open the management console.
LOGIN.CONSOLE_FORBIDDEN: This account cannot open this console. Admin or Planning role required.
LOGIN.UNKNOWN_ROLE: This account role is not supported here. Contact your system administrator.

HOME.WORKER_DESC: Station reporting, progress tracking, and orders along the production line.
HOME.ADMIN_DESC: Statistics, projects, scrap overview, and user management.
HOME.PLANNING_DESC: Upload planning files, preview BOM lines, and approve transfer to the Saws station.
HOME.FLOOR_ACCOUNT_DESC: The admin dashboard (stats, users) requires an Admin or Planning account.
HOME.SYSTEM_LOGIN_DESC: Use your organization account to open admin or planning — or go to stations after you sign in.

WORKER_HUB.HERO_SUB: Pick a station to open its tailored work UI.
WORKER_HUB.UNIT_EMPTY: No work cycles — upload production instructions
WORKER_HUB.STATION_DESC_1: Bar cutting — report how many bars to saw and meters to cut per bar.
WORKER_HUB.STATION_DESC_1_STEELWORKSHOP: Steel workshop — quantity reporting by component type (same flow as Saws).
WORKER_HUB.STATION_DESC_2: CNC processing fed from the saw station.
WORKER_HUB.STATION_DESC_2_ALU_RANGER: Alu Ranger station — aluminum profile processing and line continuation.
WORKER_HUB.STATION_DESC_3: Assembly, usage reporting and manual scrap.
WORKER_HUB.STATION_DESC_7: After delivery to site — assembly of glazing, unitized and beams per delivery note.
WORKER_HUB.STATION_DESC_8: Laser production of angles (ANG) per the files and quantities.
WORKER_HUB.STATION_LOCKED: Locked — complete all previous stations to 100%

UPLOAD_PLAN.TITLE: AI Plan Analysis & Backup
UPLOAD_PLAN.SUBTITLE: Upload a manufacturing PDF plan to extract BOM with Claude and save a secure S3 backup.
UPLOAD_PLAN.ERROR_NO_FILE: Please select a PDF file first.
UPLOAD_PLAN.ERROR_GENERIC: Plan analysis failed. Please try again.

ADMIN_PURCHASE_ORDERS.TITLE: Purchase orders
ADMIN_PURCHASE_ORDERS.SUBTITLE: All purchase orders analyzed and saved from PDF files.
ADMIN_PURCHASE_ORDERS.LOAD_ERROR: Failed to load purchase orders. Please try again.
ADMIN_PURCHASE_ORDERS.EMPTY_HINT: Upload a purchase-order PDF, analyze it and save it to see it here.
